untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external macro regime inputs (Fed policy reversal, inflation YoY rate trend, asset historical mean comparison) that are not available in the provided indicator set. The three entry signals (macro inflection, inflation topping, relative value extreme) cannot be constructed from price/volume/technical indicators alone. Partial proxy conditions used for trend confirmation only.
translation_notes: The original signal is primarily macro-fundamental in nature, requiring external data feeds (central bank policy expectations, CPI/inflation data, asset valuation models) not present in the technical indicator library. ADX_14 was used as a partial proxy for trend regime detection. The 20% stop-loss and reversal logic are inferred from the exit conditions provided. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original specification. Backtest engine would require custom macro data connectors to fully implement this signal.
